questions.question: The world lost this prolific co-writer and creator of the Marvel universe in 2018.
What app allowed a person to hear nearly any song on their phone, but with ads if they didn't have Premium?
In light of the hashtag metoo culture, this beloved holiday classic came under the microscope in 2018 for inappropriate lyrics.
In 2011, what female senator was shot in the head when a gunman opened fire outside a supermarket where she was meeting constituents?
This phrase requested photographic evidence from someone telling an unbelievable story as proof the events actually occurred.
